Interface IFunctionRasterDataset2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a function raster dataset.

[Guid("07C65BF7-D69A-41F6-BFB4-D3C79C4AC50D")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IFunctionRasterDataset2 : IFunctionRasterDataset
